column1: # GROUP mode is 1-2-3's 3D broadcast: when on, any Format/Label/Column/
# Row command issued on one sheet is also applied to every other
# sheet in the active file.  The GROUP status indicator lights on the
# bottom line while it's in effect.
# /WIS A — insert sheet B after A.
# /RFP 2 ENTER ENTER — apply Percent 2dp to A:A1.
# Prompt "Enter number of decimal places" defaults to 2; first ENTER
# accepts. Second ENTER commits the default single-cell POINT.
# GROUP propagated: B:A1 inherits the percent format.
# /WGGD — Disable.  Indicator clears; further format ops are single-sheet.
